chinese: 每个星期六，我都去打篮球。

english: The rain stopped and the sky cleared up.

chinese: 他给女朋友买了一部新手机。
english: He bought his girlfriend a new cellphone.

english: Are you ready? Smile.

chinese: 欢迎你来我们公司工作。

chinese: 她每天早上都跑步一小时。

english: It turned cloudy; it might snow.

english: Let's do these problems tomorrow.

english: How much is watermelon per jin now?

chinese: 这个房间比那个房间大。

english: The child's room is next door.
pinyin: Hái zi de fáng jiān zài páng biān.

english: My dad does not like drinking coffee.

english: He works at the train station.

chinese: 他每天都很忙，但是很快乐。

english: These tables were made over a hundred years ago.

chinese: 因为工作忙，他很少做饭。
english: Because work is busy, he rarely cooks.
pinyin: Yīnwèi gōngzuò máng, tā hěn shǎo zuò fàn.

english: Teacher Wang, your phone call.

pinyin: Zhè tiáo chuán shì cóng Shànghǎi lái de.

chinese: 今天真冷，可能有零下十度。

pinyin: Nǐ dì yī cì lái zhèr ma?

english: Have you finished reading that book?
pinyin: Nà běn shū nǐ dú wán le ma?

english: This name is very interesting.
pinyin: Zhè ge míng zi hěn yǒu yì si.

english: Take this medicine four times a day.
pinyin: Zhè yào yì tiān chī sì cì.

english: Your older sister is tall and very pretty.
pinyin: Nǐ jiě jie zhēn gāo, yě hěn piào liang.

chinese: 我的小猫在门后面玩儿。

english: You wrote this character wrong.
pinyin: Zhège zì nǐ xiě cuò le.

english: This is bái (white), not bǎi (hundred).
pinyin: Zhège shì “bái”, bú shì “bǎi”.

chinese: 我爸爸姓刘，我妈妈姓杨。

english: So my name is Liu Yang.
pinyin: Suǒyǐ wǒ jiào Liú Yáng.

english: Classmates, did you understand?
pinyin: Tóngxuémen, nǐmen tīng dǒng le ma?

chinese: 里面有你最爱吃的水果。

pinyin: Lǐ miàn yǒu nǐ zuì ài chī de shuǐ guǒ.

chinese: 手机在桌子上，电脑在旁边。

english: Is anyone in the room?

english: Her surname is Yang; her name is Yang Xiaoxiao.
pinyin: Tā xìng Yáng, jiào Yáng Xiào xiao.

english: Time passes so quickly.

pinyin: Wǒ nǚ'ér yǐjīng wǔ suì duō le.

chinese: 再过三天就是我爸爸的生日。

chinese: 我的飞机是十点零七分的。

chinese: 昨天我和朋友们在外面玩儿了一晚上。

english: You are not as tall as him.
pinyin: Nǐ méi yǒu tā gāo.

english: You are one year older than him.
pinyin: Nǐ bǐ tā dà yí suì.

chinese: 大家好，我姓王，是新来的汉语老师。

english: This month is really extremely busy.

english: He works ten hours every day.
pinyin: Tā měi tiān gōng zuò shí ge xiǎo shí.

english: She said to me with a smile, "You are welcome."
pinyin: Tā xiào zhe duì wǒ shuō: “Bú kèqi.”

chinese: 你们听懂我说的话了吗？
english: Did you understand what I said?
pinyin: Nǐ men tīng dǒng wǒ shuō de huà le ma?
parts: 你|们|听|懂|我|说|的|话|了|吗

english: Thank you for your help to us.
pinyin: Xiè xie nín gěi wǒ men de bāng zhù.
